title: Amtech V4050 P120 Hook and Loop Square Sheets 10 Piece Set, 110mm x 100mm Sanding Paper, 240 V, Clear, 110 x 100mm (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Set of 10 Perforated square sanding sheets for sanding most types of wood and painted surfaces, as well as plaster and fillers.
110mm x 100mm sanding paper with 6 precise holes for efficient dust extraction and preventing clogging and static.
Features hook and loop backing for quick and easy handling and installation.

Please note the desired finish depends on the different types of grit available. P60 Grit is for coarse sanding and P80 Grit is ideal for medium to coarse sanding. Whereas a P120 Grit is for medium sanding, and a P240 Grit would be better for an extra fine finish.
All Grits available from Amtech. P60 Grit (Amtech V4040), P80 Grit (Amtech V4045), P120 Grit (Amtech V4050), and P240 Grit (Amtech V4055).
